content:
Registration for the 4th N'Chef Cup closes this Friday! Don't hesitate any longer if you're interested in participating—come and experience the PVP by Awakeren's scents!

Here are the registration forms:

Mainland China phone number required: https://docs.qq.com/form/page/DSnp6ZnBTU0R1cE1N
Overseas friendly (no Mainland China phone number): https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd-r1rcyWt3s1gjDMBUPPaYRYzAeeev27FIIOFhtzHhYh0sZw/viewform?usp=publish-editor

embeds.title: 第四屆N廚杯報名表 Fourth N'Chef Cup Registration Form
embeds.description:
我們是由一群熱愛PVP玩家自發性組成的賽事小組來舉辦此次比賽。無論你是新手還是高手，只要你喜歡，就來報名參加我們的比賽吧！
This competition is organized by a tournament group spontaneously formed by amateur PVP enthusiasts. Whether you are a beginner or an expert, as long as you like it, com...
